name: windows-webnn-litert-green
description: Known-green baseline for Windows WebNN/LiteRT-LM build lane (pending first green build).
notes: This baseline is pending the first green build with ENABLE_WEBNN=ON.
WebNN uses LiteRT-LM as the unified C++ inference backend across all platforms.
LiteRT-LM is built from source or resolved from pre-built libraries.
Both ENABLE_WEBNN and ENABLE_WEBGPU are on for WebGPU interop testing.
Populate greenBuild fields after the first successful build passes all acceptance criteria.
